title.es: Implementación de un Data Pipeline Resiliente

description.en: Implement the approved pipeline design in your company monorepo with Prefect: ETL flows and tasks, partial-failure tolerance, retries and result caching, idempotent load with run metadata, Docker deployment with schedule, and FastAPI endpoints to query last run status and trigger manual execution — aligned with PIPELINE_DESIGN.md and CONTEXT-company.md.
description.es: Implementa en el monorepo de tu empresa el diseño de pipeline aprobado con Prefect: flows y tasks ETL, tolerancia a fallos parciales, reintentos y caché de resultados, carga idempotente con metadatos de ejecución, deployment Docker con schedule, y endpoints FastAPI para consultar el estado de la última ejecución y lanzar runs manuales — alineado con PIPELINE_DESIGN.md y CONTEXT-empresa.md.

sharing.en: I just completed Implementing a Resilient Data Pipeline with LearnPack @4GeeksAcademy. Check it out: https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/ai-eng-data-pipeline-build #AIEngineering #LearnPack #4GeeksAcademy #prefect #dataengineering #etl
